hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】雷·达里奥表示凯文·沃什不应在“滞胀”时代降息；【FINANCE】这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易；【CRYPTO】由于油价上涨和伊朗风险阻碍涨势，比特币回落至 76,600 美元。

items.title: Ray Dalio says Kevin Warsh shouldn't cut interest rates in a ‘stagflation’ era
items.summary: Dalio said that if Kevin Warsh were to cut rates, it would risk damaging confidence in the central bank at a critical moment.
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥表示凯文·沃什不应在“滞胀”时代降息
items.summary_zh: 达里奥表示，如果凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）降息，可能会在关键时刻损害人们对央行的信心。

items.title: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
items.summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.
items.title_zh: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) 已飙升逾 600%，远远优于原油和能源股。

items.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $76,600 as rising oil price and Iran risks stall the rally
items.summary: Short-term holder profit-taking is offsetting fresh demand from ETFs and Strategy, pointing to consolidation below $80,000, Bitfinex analysts said.
items.title_zh: 由于油价上涨和伊朗风险阻碍涨势，比特币回落至 76,600 美元
items.summary_zh: Bitfinex 分析师表示，短期持有者的获利了结正在抵消 ETF 和策略的新需求，表明将在 80,000 美元以下盘整。

items.title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
items.summary: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce
items.title_zh: 这位银行首席执行官让他的人工智能克隆人处理财报电话会议——现在他正在签署一项 OpenAI 协议
items.summary_zh: 这是 Customers Bank 首席执行官 Sam Sidhu 努力的一部分，目的是利用人工智能代理作为新的数字劳动力，在行业转型竞赛中取得领先

items.title: Canada’s crypto donation ban clears key vote with support from Conservatives
items.summary: Bill C-25, the Strong and Free Elections Act, cleared second reading Friday and heads to committee as Conservative lawmakers raise but don’t challenge the proposed ban on bitcoin contributions
items.title_zh: 加拿大的加密货币捐赠禁令在保守党的支持下获得了关键投票
items.summary_zh: C-25 法案（《强有力的自由选举法案》）于周五通过了二读，并在保守党议员提出但不质疑拟议的禁止比特币捐款的情况下进入委员会。

items.title: Rep. Begich plans revival of bitcoin strategic reserve bill under new name to codify Trump’s executive order
items.summary: Legislation to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve in the U.S. is set to be reintroduced in the next few weeks.
items.title_zh: 众议员贝吉奇计划以新名称恢复比特币战略储备法案，以将特朗普的行政命令编入法典
items.summary_zh: 美国将在未来几周内重新出台建立比特币战略储备的立法。

items.title: Aven bitcoin Visa card will offer BTC-backed line of credit of up to $1 million
items.summary: Aven's new bitcoin credit card will offer fixed-rate, fixed-term loans of up to 10 years at a 7.99% APR as well as unlimited 2% cash back.
items.title_zh: Aven 比特币 Visa 卡将提供高达 100 万美元的 BTC 支持信用额度
items.summary_zh: Aven 的新比特币信用卡将提供长达 10 年的固定利率、定期贷款、年利率 7.99% 以及无限的 2% 现金返还。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
items.summary: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争损害全球金融，贝森特捍卫美元互换额度
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统本周在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中被问及可能的阿联酋互换额度时，似乎表示他赞成这一做法。

items.title: Nuclear reactor company X-energy shares surge 27% as AI drives interest in its IPO
items.summary: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy began trading Friday as the AI boom and electrification broadly spark a flurry of interest in the nuclear industry.
items.title_zh: 核反应堆公司 X-energy 股价飙升 27%，人工智能推动其 IPO 兴趣
items.summary_zh: 随着人工智能热潮和电气化广泛引发人们对核工业的浓厚兴趣，先进核反应堆公司 X-energy 于周五开始交易。

items.title: Bettors on Kalshi now see Warsh likely confirmed by mid-May after DOJ drops Powell probe
items.summary: Bettors on the platform now see an 86% chance that Warsh's nomination is confirmed by the U.S. Senate by May 15.
items.title_zh: 在司法部撤销鲍威尔调查后，卡尔希的投注者现在认为沃什可能会在五月中旬得到确认
items.summary_zh: 该平台上的投注者现在认为，沃什的提名在 5 月 15 日之前获得美国参议院批准的可能性为 86%。

items.title: The aerospace and defense trade is taking investors deeper into space, and more ETFs are up for the mission
items.summary: VettaFi's Cinthia Murphy finds more exchange-traded funds are tackling the space theme more directly as excitement over the SpaceX IPO grows.
items.title_zh: 航空航天和国防贸易正在将投资者带入更深入的太空，更多的 ETF 正准备迎接这一使命
items.summary_zh: VettaFi 的辛西娅·墨菲 (Cinthia Murphy) 发现，随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的热情日益高涨，越来越多的交易所交易基金正在更直接地探讨太空主题。

items.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani knocked Ken Griffin in pied-a-terre tax promo. His firm calls the move 'shameful'
items.summary: Chief Operating Officer Gerald Beeson saying in a memo that targeting Griffin showed "ignorance and disdain" toward contributors to the city's economy.
items.title_zh: 纽约市市长马姆达尼在临时税收促销活动中击败了肯·格里芬。他的公司称此举“可耻”
items.summary_zh: 首席运营官杰拉尔德·比森(Gerald Beeson)在一份备忘录中表示，针对格里芬表现出对该市经济贡献者的“无知和蔑视”。

items.title: Traders are betting on big moves in Intel on earnings
items.summary: Semiconductor stocks are powering the U.S. equity market to records and traders are predicting that means a big swing in shares of Intel after earnings tonight.
items.title_zh: 交易员押注英特尔盈利的重大变动
items.summary_zh: 半导体股正在推动美国股市创下历史新高，交易员预测这意味着今晚公布财报后英特尔股价将出现大幅波动。

items.title: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
items.summary: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚悬赏创纪录的 140 万美元悬赏叛军，追究造成致命炸弹袭击的叛乱分子
items.summary_zh: 官员称，一名名叫“马龙”的叛军领导人下令发动这次袭击，造成 20 人死亡。

items.title: Hezbollah Vows to Keep Its Weapons as Lebanon Says Israeli Strikes Killed 14
items.summary: Despite a cease-fire, Israel and Hezbollah have been trading attacks almost daily.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩称以色列空袭造成 14 人死亡，真主党誓言保留武器
items.summary_zh: 尽管停火，以色列和真主党几乎每天都在互相攻击。

items.title: Iran’s Foreign Minister Is in Russia for Talks With Putin on Middle East War
items.summary: Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s foreign minister, met with President Vladimir V. Putin in Moscow. Russia has tried to avoid entanglement in the conflict while remaining a key player in the region.
items.title_zh: 伊朗外长正在俄罗斯与普京就中东战争进行会谈
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇在莫斯科会见了总统弗拉基米尔·V·普京。俄罗斯试图避免卷入冲突，同时仍然是该地区的关键参与者。

items.title: Fighting ‘Sacred’ War in Ukraine, North Korea and Russia Pledge to Deepen Ties
items.summary: The two countries discussed long-term military cooperation, as they opened a memorial for North Korean troops killed in Russia’s war in Ukraine.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰、朝鲜和俄罗斯的“神圣”战争承诺深化关系
items.summary_zh: 两国讨论了长期军事合作，并为在俄罗斯乌克兰战争中阵亡的朝鲜士兵开设了纪念碑。

items.title: Bitcoin is climbing on thin volume, leaving rally vulnerable to macro shock
items.summary: Low trading volume and a lack of conviction from big-money bettors could leave the bitcoin rally on shaky ground, said 10x Research head Markus Thielen.
items.title_zh: 比特币成交量清淡攀升，导致反弹容易受到宏观冲击
items.summary_zh: 10x 研究主管马库斯·蒂伦 (Markus Thielen) 表示，低交易量和大手笔押注者缺乏信心可能会让比特币的涨势摇摇欲坠。

items.title: Acting AG Blanche: DOJ has ‘fundamentally changed the game’ for developers
items.summary: Acting AG Blanche offered some reassurance to software developers as the Justice Department continues its case against Roman Storm.
items.title_zh: 代理 AG 布兰奇：司法部已经“从根本上改变了开发者的游戏规则”
items.summary_zh: 随着司法部继续对 Roman Storm 提起诉讼，代理 AG Blanche 向软件开发人员提供了一些保证。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Firo (FIRO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #947.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Firo (FIRO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#947。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #90.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 90。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #124.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 124。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #54.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aave (AAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 54。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Carney to Launch Sovereign Wealth Fund to Distance Canada’s Economy From U.S.
items.summary: The sovereign wealth fund announced by Prime Minister Mark Carney will be far smaller than ones in other oil producers like Norway and the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 卡尼将推出主权财富基金以拉开加拿大经济与美国的距离
items.summary_zh: 首相马克·卡尼宣布的主权财富基金规模将远远小于挪威和中东等其他石油生产国的主权财富基金。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Bitcoin rally shows signs of fatigue as key indicators turn bearish
items.summary: Cooling U.S. demand, elevated Bitfinex whale positioning and a key on chain rejection point to short term downside during the Las Vegas Bitcoin conference.
items.title_zh: 随着关键指标转为看跌，比特币涨势出现疲软迹象
items.summary_zh: 拉斯维加斯比特币会议期间，美国需求降温、Bitfinex 鲸鱼仓位上升以及链上拒绝的关键因素都表明比特币短期会下跌。

items.title: Western Union eyeing stablecoin launch to settle global transactions without SWIFT, CEO says
items.summary: The 175-year-old money-transfer firm also plans to issue a stablecoin-linked card for payments and cash-out options from crypto to local currencies, CEO Devin McGranahan said.
items.title_zh: 首席执行官表示，西联汇款希望推出稳定币，以在没有 SWIFT 的情况下结算全球交易
items.summary_zh: 首席执行官 Devin McGranahan 表示，这家拥有 175 年历史的汇款公司还计划发行一张与稳定币挂钩的卡，用于支付和从加密货币到当地货币的现金提取选项。

items.title: MARA Holdings targets bitcoin quantum threat and network resilience with new foundation
items.summary: Bitcoin's future is not guaranteed, said CEO Fred Thiel at the Bitcoin Conference in Las Vegas.
items.title_zh: MARA Holdings 以新基础瞄准比特币量子威胁和网络弹性
items.summary_zh: 首席执行官 Fred Thiel 在拉斯维加斯举行的比特币会议上表示，比特币的未来并没有保障。

items.title: Cross-border B2B stablecoin payments to hit $5 trillion by 2035, says Juniper Research
items.summary: Juniper Research found that 85% of all stablecoin transaction value in 2035 will be driven by international business-to-business (B2B) payments.
items.title_zh: Juniper Research 表示，到 2035 年，跨境 B2B 稳定币支付将达到 5 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Juniper Research 发现，到 2035 年，85% 的稳定币交易额将由国际企业对企业 (B2B) 支付推动。

items.title: Fidelity Digital Assets says bitcoin is leading crypto market stabilization
items.summary: Despite muted prices to start the second quarter, the report said improving onchain metrics and network activity point to a market finding its footing.
items.title_zh: 富达数字资产表示比特币正在引领加密市场的稳定
items.summary_zh: 尽管第二季度开始价格低迷，但报告称，链上指标和网络活动的改善表明市场已站稳脚跟。

items.title: ‘We don’t take Satoshi’s bitcoin’: eCash fork sparks backlash over ‘reassigned’ coins
items.summary: The eCash fork will act as a live test of Paul Sztorc’s long-running drivechains-sidechains vision for the bitcoin network.
items.title_zh: “我们不接受中本聪的比特币”：eCash 分叉引发了对“重新分配”硬币的强烈反对
items.summary_zh: eCash 分叉将作为 Paul Sztorc 长期运行的比特币网络驱动链-侧链愿景的实时测试。

items.title: MARA Foundation to foster long-term adoption of Bitcoin, including resilience against quantum and security budget risks
items.summary: The recently formed MARA Foundation said it will focus on the long-term health, resilience, and adoption of the Bitcoin protocol.
items.title_zh: MARA 基金会将促进比特币的长期采用，包括抵御量子和安全预算风险
items.summary_zh: 最近成立的 MARA 基金会表示，它将专注于比特币协议的长期健康、弹性和采用。

items.title: DeFi United push hits $300M as Consensys and Joseph Lubin contribute 30,000 ETH
items.summary: The industry-wide effort dubbed DeFi United had raised roughly $235 million worth of Ethereum as of Monday.
items.title_zh: Consensys 和 Joseph Lubin 贡献了 30,000 ETH，DeFi United 的推动额达到 3 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 截至周一，全行业范围内名为 DeFi United 的项目已筹集了价值约 2.35 亿美元的以太坊。

items.title: ‘Clear runway’ to 5,000 BTC: Benchmark initiates Asian food platform DDC, sees 70% upside
items.summary: DDC is investing in an "AI-driven operating system" to help guide its bitcoin purchases as it aims to reach 5,000 BTC by year-end 2026.
items.title_zh: 通向 5,000 BTC 的“清晰跑道”：Benchmark 推出亚洲食品平台 DDC，预计上涨 70%
items.summary_zh: DDC 正在投资“人工智能驱动的操作系统”，以帮助指导其比特币购买，其目标是到 2026 年底达到 5,000 BTC。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子变压器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Foreign car companies bet on technology to hang onto once-lucrative China auto market
items.summary: U.S., Korean and German automakers announced a rush of new, tech-enabled cars at the Beijing Auto Show as they battle a sales slump
items.title_zh: 外国汽车公司押注技术以保住曾经利润丰厚的中国汽车市场
items.summary_zh: 美国、韩国和德国汽车制造商在北京车展上宣布推出大量新型科技汽车，以应对销量下滑

items.title: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
items.summary: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.title_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普在寡妇笑话后敦促美国广播公司对吉米·金梅尔“表明立场”
items.summary_zh: 在白宫记者晚宴前几天播出的一段模仿节目中，金梅尔称梅拉尼娅是“准寡妇”。

items.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
items.summary: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称金在安全会谈后访问美国期间“非常安全”
items.summary_zh: 尽管一名枪手瞄准了总统参加的活动，但国事访问仍将继续进行。

items.title: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.summary: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦被指控袭击阿富汗大学
items.summary_zh: 消息人士告诉 BBC，库纳尔省的空袭已造成至少 7 人死亡、75 人受伤。

items.title: Venice opera house drops incoming music director after nepotism remarks
items.summary: Beatrice Venezi's appointment had been marred in controversy since being announced last September, prompting orchestra members to go on strike.
items.title_zh: 因裙带关系言论，威尼斯歌剧院解雇了即将上任的音乐总监
items.summary_zh: 自从去年九月宣布任命比阿特丽斯·维内齐 (Beatrice Venezi) 以来，就一直饱受争议，导致乐团成员举行罢工。

items.title: At least four killed and dozens injured in Indonesia train crash
items.summary: Officials say a commuter train and a long-distance train collided on the outskirts of Jakarta on Monday.
items.title_zh: 印尼火车相撞事故造成至少四人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 官员称，周一，一列通勤列车与一列长途列车在雅加达郊区相撞。

items.title: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
items.summary: The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday.
items.title_zh: 枪手袭击尼日利亚孤儿院并绑架儿童
items.summary_zh: 周日的袭击中，23 名儿童和该设施的老板娘被枪手绑架。

items.title: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
items.summary: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯武装分子确认在分裂分子袭击后从马里北部城市撤军
items.summary_zh: 图阿雷格族战士表示，在周末发生全国性袭击后，他们与伊斯兰组织一起控制了基达尔。

items.title: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
items.summary: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·杰克逊传记片打破票房纪录
items.summary_zh: 该片评价不佳，但票房却突飞猛进，全球票房达到 2.17 亿美元（1.6 亿英镑）。

items.title: At least 42 killed in Chad after water well dispute escalates
items.summary: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.
items.title_zh: 乍得水井纠纷升级 至少42人死亡
items.summary_zh: 争端最初发生在两个家庭之间，后来升级为报复性袭击的循环。

items.title: Iran Offers Plan to Focus on Strait of Hormuz and Delay Nuclear Talks
items.summary: In its latest offer delivered on Sunday, Iran proposed opening the key waterway to shipping traffic and lifting the U.S. blockade, while postponing the thornier nuclear issue until later.
items.title_zh: 伊朗提出计划重点关注霍尔木兹海峡并推迟核谈判
items.summary_zh: 在周日提出的最新提议中，伊朗提议开放主要水道并解除美国的封锁，同时将棘手的核问题推迟到晚些时候。

items.title: Canada Says Its Gold Is Traceable and Clean. So We Traced It.
items.summary: We ended up in a Colombian mine controlled by a drug cartel.
items.title_zh: 加拿大称其黄金可追溯且清洁。所以我们追踪了它。
items.summary_zh: 我们最终来到了一个由贩毒集团控制的哥伦比亚矿井。

items.title: Mali Terror Attack: Defense Minister Killed by Al Qaeda-Linked JNIM
items.summary: The death of the defense minister, Gen. Sadio Camara, a central figure in the country’s military government, comes amid escalating violence in the region.
items.title_zh: 马里恐怖袭击：国防部长被与基地组织有关联的 JNIM 杀害
items.summary_zh: 该国军政府核心人物、国防部长萨迪奥·卡马拉将军去世之际，该地区暴力事件不断升级。

items.title: Canada’s New Route to Citizenship Has Thousands of Americans Lining Up to Apply
items.summary: Canada has opened a route to citizenship for people who can prove they have a Canada-born ancestor. Millions could qualify, and Americans are already lining up to apply.
items.title_zh: 加拿大入籍新途径吸引数千美国人排队申请
items.summary_zh: 加拿大为那些能够证明其祖先在加拿大出生的人开辟了获得公民身份的途径。数百万人可以获得资格，美国人已经在排队申请。

items.title: King Charles Is Coming to the U.S. at a Very Delicate Time
items.summary: Not since his mother, Queen Elizabeth II, traveled to Washington after the Suez Crisis has a visit by the British monarch come at such a fraught point in Anglo-American relations.
items.title_zh: 查尔斯国王在非常微妙的时刻来到美国
items.summary_zh: 自从他的母亲伊丽莎白二世女王在苏伊士运河危机后访问华盛顿以来，英国君主还没有在英美关系如此紧张的时刻访问华盛顿。

items.title: Euphoria in Kenya After Sabastian Sawe’s Record-Breaking Win
items.summary: The London Marathon winner’s achievement has resonated nowhere more than in Kenya’s Rift Valley, which has yielded many champions.
items.title_zh: 萨巴斯蒂安·萨维 (Sabastian Sawe) 破纪录获胜后，肯尼亚欣喜若狂
items.summary_zh: 这位伦敦马拉松冠军的成就在肯尼亚裂谷引起了更大的反响，这里曾产生过许多冠军。

items.title: Curve founder pitches market-based fix for $700K bad debt in contrast to Aave bailout
items.summary: The plan allows trapped lenders to sell tokenized claims on deposits, offering buyers an option-like bet on CRV's recovery.
items.title_zh: Curve 创始人提出基于市场的 70 万美元坏账修复方案，与 Aave 救助形成鲜明对比
items.summary_zh: 该计划允许陷入困境的贷方出售代币化的存款债权，为买家提供类似期权的押注 CRV 的复苏。

items.title: Solana developers outline plan to protect network from quantum threats
items.summary: Two of the network’s core developer teams, Anza and Jump Crypto’s Firedancer, have landed on the same solution: a new type of digital signature called Falcon.
items.title_zh: Solana 开发人员概述了保护网络免受量子威胁的计划
items.summary_zh: 该网络的两个核心开发团队 Anza 和 Jump Crypto 的 Firedancer 已经采用了相同的解决方案：一种名为 Falcon 的新型数字签名。

items.title: Sen. Tillis becomes ‘latest roadblock’ for crypto bill as he pushes ethics provisions, TD Cowen says
items.summary: Thom Tillis has reportedly said he would not support the crypto bill if it does not include conflict-of-interest provisions.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 表示，参议员蒂利斯在推动道德条款时成为加密货币法案的“最新障碍”
items.summary_zh: 据报道，汤姆·蒂利斯 (Thom Tillis) 表示，如果加密货币法案不包含利益冲突条款，他将不会支持该法案。

items.title: Luca Netz on building a brand people actually love
items.summary: Netz explains how Pudgy Penguins is evolving from NFTs into a consumer brand by focusing on culture, IP, and mass adoption over speculation.
items.title_zh: Luca Netz 打造人们真正喜爱的品牌
items.summary_zh: Netz 解释了 Pudgy Penguins 如何通过关注文化、IP 和大规模采用而不是投机，从 NFT 发展成为消费品牌。

items.title: Gemini rolls out Agentic Trading allowing AI bots to directly manage crypto exchange trading accounts
items.summary: Gemini referred to the feature as “the first agentic trading tool to be available directly through a regulated US-based exchange.”
items.title_zh: Gemini 推出代理交易，允许人工智能机器人直接管理加密货币交易所交易账户
items.summary_zh: Gemini 将该功能称为“第一个可通过受监管的美国交易所直接使用的代理交易工具”。

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.title_zh: 编排的开源规范：Symphony
items.summary_zh: 了解 Symphony（Codex 编排的开源规范）如何将问题跟踪器转变为始终在线的代理系统，从而提高工程输出并减少上下文切换。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.title_zh: Choco 通过 AI 代理实现食品配送自动化
items.summary_zh: Choco 如何使用 OpenAI API 简化食品配送、提高生产力并实现增长——关于真实世界人工智能影响的深入客户故事。

items.title: Our principles
items.summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
items.title_zh: 我们的原则
items.summary_zh: 我们的使命是确保 AGI 造福全人类。 Sam Altman 分享了指导我们工作的五项原则。

items.title_zh: GPT-5.5系统卡

items.summary: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
items.title_zh: 如何开始使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解如何通过设置项目、创建线程以及按照分步指导完成第一个任务来开始使用 Codex。

items.title: What is Codex?
items.summary: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.
items.title_zh: 什么是法典？
items.summary_zh: 了解 Codex 如何通过自动化任务、连接工具以及生成文档和仪表板等真实输出来帮助您超越聊天。

items.title: Automations
items.summary: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.
items.title_zh: 自动化
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用计划和触发器自动执行 Codex 中的任务，以创建报告、摘要和重复工作流程，而无需手动操作。

items.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4：代理可以实际使用的百万令牌上下文

items.title_zh: 如何在 Chrome 扩展中使用 Transformers.js

items.title_zh: QIMMA قِّבÉ ⛰：质量第一的阿拉伯语 LLM 排行榜

items.title_zh: Ecom-RLVE：电子商务会话代理的自适应可验证环境

items.title: Join the new AI Agents Vibe Coding Course from Google and Kaggle
items.summary: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.
items.title_zh: 加入 Google 和 Kaggle 推出的新 AI Agents Vibe 编码课程
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将通过 Kaggle 重新推出为期 5 天的人工智能代理强化课程，现已开放报名。

items.title: 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
items.summary: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式

items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.

items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。
